name: Software
summary: The Software collector lists software installed on managed devices.

fields.name: installdate
fields.description: A date-time value indicating when the object was installed.

fields.name: publisher
fields.description: The name of the software's supplier.

examples.title: Example: Show installed software provided by 'Bad Co.' publisher
examples.v2_query: Software where Software publisher equals "Bad Co."

examples.title: What software is installed
examples.v2_query: Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname, displayname

examples.title: Which software version am i running - by program single
examples.v2_query:
Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname
    WHERE Software displayname contains "zoom"

examples.title: Which software version am i running - by program many
examples.v2_query:
Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname
    WHERE Software displayname contains "zoom"
        OR Software displayname contains "google"
        OR Software displayname contains "adobe"

examples.title: Which software version am i running - by version single
examples.v2_query:
Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname
    WHERE Software displayname contains "zoom"
        AND Software version not equals "4.6"

examples.title: Which software version am i running - by version many
examples.v2_query:
Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname
    WHERE Software displayname contains "zoom"
        AND Software version not equals "4.6"
        AND Software version not equals "4.5"
        AND Software version not equals "4.1"
